hero.title: The Most Transparent AI in Indian Agri-Tech

hero.subtitle2: Because we built this product for farmers, not for investors.

mapeChart.title: 30-Day MAPE Trend
mapeChart.subtitle: Daily MAPE performance over the last 30 days. Green zone indicates target performance (< 6%).

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.subtitle: How our model achieves 95%+ directional accuracy

questions.question: What is MAPE?
questions.answer: MAPE (Mean Absolute Percentage Error) measures the average percentage difference between our predicted prices and actual market prices. A MAPE below 6% means our predictions are, on average, within 6% of the actual price.

questions.question: What is directional accuracy?
questions.answer: Directional accuracy measures whether we correctly predicted whether prices would go up or down. 96.2% directional accuracy means we got the direction right 96 out of 100 times. This is what matters most for sell timing decisions.

questions.question: What data does the model use?
questions.answer: Our model uses 47 public data sources including AGMARKNET mandi prices, NECC poultry statistics, IMD weather forecasts, feed commodity prices (maize, soy), festival calendars, and HPAI outbreak data from government sources.

questions.question: How often does the model retrain?
questions.answer: The model retrains weekly with a champion/challenger framework. We test new model versions against a 6-month holdout dataset before deployment. If a new version beats the current champion by 2%+ directional accuracy, we promote it.

questions.question: What are conformal prediction intervals?
questions.answer: Conformal prediction gives us statistically valid confidence intervals. When we show P10-P90 ranges, there is a calibrated 80% probability that the actual price will fall within that range. This helps you understand uncertainty in the forecast.

featureImportance.title: Feature Importance
featureImportance.subtitle: Top 5 factors that drive today's price forecast. This demystifies the AI and shows you what the model is actually looking at.

stressTests.title: Stress Test Results
stressTests.subtitle: How our model performed during historical market shocks

validationAttestation.title: Manual Validation Attestation
validationAttestation.description: Our CTO and Data Head spent 10 days at Gorakhpur APMC in November 2025, recording actual broker prices manually. Our model predicted the correct direction 9 out of 10 days. This is our baseline before we take a single rupee from customers.

hero.title: Beyond Price Intelligence — Complete Farm Operations in One Platform
hero.description: Price intelligence without operational data is an estimate. Price intelligence combined with your actual FCR, mortality, and weight gain is a precise business decision engine.

narrativeBox.title: How Operational Data Makes Price Intelligence Better
narrativeBox.dataMoat: The Data Moat: Every operational data point you log — FCR, mortality, weight gain, feed costs — strengthens our price prediction model for your specific farm.
narrativeBox.compoundIntelligence: Compound Intelligence: Farms with complete operational data see 12–18% higher price prediction accuracy because the model learns your farm's unique patterns.
narrativeBox.precisionEngine: Precision Decision Engine: When you combine market price forecasts with your actual batch performance, sell decisions become precise business calculations, not estimates.
narrativeBox.footer: The more you use FlockIQ for operations, the smarter your price intelligence becomes.
